usd_reason: The dollar is rising because investors think US interest rates might go up soon
gold_reason: Higher US interest rates would make gold less attractive to investors
indices_reason: The stock market is worried about the possibility of higher interest rates
lead_story: The Federal Reserve, led by new chairman Kevin Warsh, has decided to keep interest rates steady for now, but some officials think they might need to raise rates later this year. This uncertainty is causing investors to be cautious. The Fed's decision is the biggest driver of the markets right now, and investors are trying to figure out what it means for the economy.
